scripts.dev: npm run dev:api & npm run dev:web
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @collaborate/contracts && npm run build --workspace @collaborate/api && npm run build --workspace @collaborate/web
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @collaborate/contracts && npm run test --workspace @collaborate/api && npm run test --workspace @collaborate/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @collaborate/contracts && npm run typecheck --workspace @collaborate/contracts && npm run typecheck --workspace @collaborate/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @collaborate/web
